columns.extraction_plan: The median on-treatment duration for the treatment group was not explicitly reported in the PDF. The document mentions 'median follow-up' (pages 1, 2, 6) and 'time from randomisation to starting treatment' (page 6), and reasons for 'stopping treatment' (page 11), but not the median duration of the treatment itself.

The median on-treatment duration for the control group was not explicitly reported in the PDF.
